raw/compass-iot/.name: COMPASS IoT Raw Data
raw/compass-iot/.description: UNSW Data Science School vehicle type analysis data from COMPASS IoT sensors. Contains raw CSV exports of vehicle detection and classification records across the NSW road network.

processed/compass-iot/.name: COMPASS IoT Processed
processed/compass-iot/.description: Processed COMPASS IoT trip and ping data in Apache Iceberg format. Partitioned by StartDate with trip trajectories and GPS pings as separate Iceberg tables.

raw/du_tfnsw_prediction/.name: TfNSW Traffic Prediction
raw/du_tfnsw_prediction/.description: Transport for NSW traffic volume prediction analysis. Includes station information, baseline vs model metrics comparisons, and prediction visualisations.

raw/compass-iot_2025_data.zip.name: COMPASS IoT 2025 Archive
raw/compass-iot_2025_data.zip.description: Compressed archive of COMPASS IoT raw data collected during 2025. Contains vehicle detection and classification records.

raw/compass_iot_data_au_2026.tar.gz.name: COMPASS IoT 2026 Archive
raw/compass_iot_data_au_2026.tar.gz.description: Compressed archive of COMPASS IoT raw data collected during 2026. Contains vehicle detection and classification records across Australia.

raw/overture/.name: Overture Maps Raw Extracts
raw/overture/.description: Raw GeoParquet extracts from Overture Maps Foundation covering 11 layers (roads, POIs, buildings, landuse, addresses, infrastructure, land cover, connectors, building parts, divisions, bathymetry) clipped to city boundaries.

processed/overture/.name: Overture Maps H3 Hex Features
processed/overture/.description: ML-ready H3 hex-level aggregated features from Overture Maps data. 50+ feature columns covering road density, POI counts, building stats, landuse mix, and more with log1p and binary transforms.

processed/overture_ggearth/.name: Overture + Satellite Embeddings H3
processed/overture_ggearth/.description: Google Alpha Earth satellite embedding vectors at H3 resolution 8 and 9, joined with Overture Maps Foundation data for Sydney and Melbourne. Captures land use, built environment, and vegetation patterns.
processed/overture_ggearth/.license: Alpha Earth - CC BY 4.0 (non-commercial download, register for commercial)
